vocab.meaning: khả năng tiếp cận vô song
vocab.example: The platform offers unrivaled accessibility to academic papers that were previously behind expensive paywalls.

vocab.meaning: một lượng lớn kiến thức chuyên môn
vocab.example: I gravitate towards MasterClass because it provides a wealth of expertise from world-renowned professionals.

vocab.meaning: giao diện được tinh giản/tối ưu
vocab.example: What sets this news site apart is its streamlined interface, which eliminates unnecessary clutter and pop-ups.

vocab.meaning: được thiết kế riêng theo sở thích của tôi
vocab.example: The beauty of YouTube is that the homepage is perfectly tailored to my preferences, suggesting content I actually enjoy.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra
vocab.example: I find Wikipedia fascinating because it relies on high-quality user-generated content that is constantly peer-reviewed.

vocab.meaning: đồng bộ hóa đa nền tảng
vocab.example: Notion is my favorite site due to its seamless cross-platform synchronization between my laptop and smartphone.

vocab.meaning: độ bao phủ/tường thuật toàn diện
vocab.example: For global news, the BBC provides comprehensive coverage that I find far more objective than other outlets.

vocab.meaning: bố cục cực kỳ trực quan/dễ dùng
vocab.example: The highly intuitive layout of Canva makes it possible for someone with no design background to create professional posters.

vocab.meaning: thông tin cập nhật từng phút
vocab.example: I keep a tab open for Reuters to ensure I receive up-to-the-minute information on market fluctuations.

vocab.meaning: hệ sinh thái kỹ thuật số sôi động
vocab.example: GitHub is more than just a website; it’s a vibrant digital ecosystem where developers collaborate on open-source projects.
